identity.name: FomoFam
identity.mission: A cinematic, scroll-choreographed event discovery platform that bridges Web3 functionality with consumer-grade aesthetics.
identity.target_audience: Event organizers, attendees, sponsors in Web3/tech/community space

headings.usage: Use for all section titles, hero text, and major callouts. Avoid Inter for headings.

body.usage: Use for descriptions, card details, and functional text.

mono.usage: Use sparingly for stats, dates, or 'code-like' aesthetic details.

usage_rules.primary: Use for Primary CTAs, active states, and key highlights. Do not overuse.
usage_rules.secondary: Use for Footer, dark section backgrounds, or strong contrast text.
usage_rules.gradients: Use soft gradients for backgrounds or button hovers. No full-screen dark gradients.
usage_rules.glassmorphism: Use for floating cards, sticky headers, and overlays.

grid_system.listing: Use responsive grid (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 xl:grid-cols-4) with gap-6 or gap-8.
grid_system.spacing: Generous spacing. Use p-8, py-20, gap-8. Avoid cramped layouts.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-white hover:opacity-90 transition-all duration-300 shadow-lg hover:shadow-primary/25 active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-secondary border border-gray-200 hover:bg-gray-50 transition-all duration-300

cards.event: bg-white rounded-2xl shadow-sm border border-gray-100 hover:shadow-xl hover:-translate-y-1 transition-all duration-300 group overflow-hidden
cards.feature: bg-white/50 backdrop-blur-md border border-white/60 rounded-xl p-6 shadow-sm

inputs.style: bg-white border-gray-200 focus:border-primary focus:ring-primary/20 rounded-lg h-12 px-4 transition-all

patterns.fade_up: initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }} whileInView={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }} transition={{ duration: 0.5, ease: 'easeOut' }}
patterns.float: animate={{ y: [0, -10, 0] }} transition={{ repeat: Infinity, duration: 3, ease: 'easeInOut' }}
patterns.parallax: Use scroll() timeline for background elements moving at different speeds.

visual_enhancers.backgrounds: Use subtle gradient orbs (blur-3xl) moving slowly in the background.
visual_enhancers.shadows: Use colored shadows for primary elements (shadow-primary/20).
visual_enhancers.borders: Use 1px borders with low opacity for clean separation.
visual_enhancers.textures: Optional: very subtle grain overlay (opacity 0.03) for filmic feel.

do_not: Do NOT use gradients for text.
Do NOT use generic 'Inter' for headings.
Do NOT use blockchain jargon (unless in tooltip).
Do NOT align everything to center.
must_do: Must use data-testid for all interactive elements.
Must implement hover states for all interactables.
Must use 'Outfit' or similar for headings.
